section: H2:Owner and Data Controller
sentence: QuestUpon Technologies Inc., 1111 Beach Ave, Vancouver, BC, V6E 1T9

section: H2:Owner and Data Controller
sentence: Owner contact email: info@questupon.com

section: H2:Types of Data collected
sentence: Among the types of Personal Data that QuestUpon collects, by itself or through third parties, there are: email address; geographic position; Trackers; Usage Data; first name; last name; profile picture.

section: H2:Types of Data collected
sentence: Complete details on each type of Personal Data collected are provided in the dedicated sections of this privacy policy or by specific explanation texts displayed prior to the Data collection.

section: H2:Types of Data collected
sentence: Personal Data may be freely provided by the User, or, in case of Usage Data, collected automatically when using QuestUpon.

section: H2:Types of Data collected
sentence: Unless specified otherwise, all Data requested by QuestUpon is mandatory and failure to provide this Data may make it impossible for QuestUpon to provide its services. In cases where QuestUpon specifically states that some Data is not mandatory, Users are free not to communicate this Data without consequences to the availability or the functioning of the Service.

section: H2:Types of Data collected
sentence: Users who are uncertain about which Personal Data is mandatory are welcome to contact the Owner.

section: H2:Types of Data collected
sentence: Any use of Cookies – or of other tracking tools — by QuestUpon or by the owners of third-party services used by QuestUpon serves the purpose of providing the Service required by the User, in addition to any other purposes described in the present document.

section: H2:Types of Data collected
sentence: Users are responsible for any third-party Personal Data obtained, published or shared through QuestUpon.

section: H2:Mode and place of processing the Data > H3:Methods of processing
sentence: The Owner takes appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access, disclosure, modification, or unauthorized destruction of the Data.

section: H2:Mode and place of processing the Data > H3:Methods of processing
sentence: The Data processing is carried out using computers and/or IT enabled tools, following organizational procedures and modes strictly related to the purposes indicated. In addition to the Owner, in some cases, the Data may be accessible to certain types of persons in charge, involved with the operation of QuestUpon (administration, sales, marketing, legal, system administration) or external parties (such as third-party technical service providers, mail carriers, hosting providers, IT companies, communications agencies) appointed, if necessary, as Data Processors by the Owner. The updated list of these parties may be requested from the Owner at any time.

section: H2:Mode and place of processing the Data > H3:Place
sentence: The Data is processed at the Owner's operating offices and in any other places where the parties involved in the processing are located.

section: H2:Mode and place of processing the Data > H3:Place
sentence: Depending on the User's location, data transfers may involve transferring the User's Data to a country other than their own. To find out more about the place of processing of such transferred Data, Users can check the section containing details about the processing of Personal Data.

section: H2:Mode and place of processing the Data > H3:Retention time
sentence: Unless specified otherwise in this document, Personal Data shall be processed and stored for as long as required by the purpose they have been collected for and may be retained for longer due to applicable legal obligation or based on the Users’ consent.

section: H2:The purposes of processing
sentence: The Data concerning the User is collected to allow the Owner to provide its Service, comply with its legal obligations, respond to enforcement requests, protect its rights and interests (or those of its Users or third parties), detect any malicious or fraudulent activity, as well as the following: Contacting the User, Location-based interactions, Hosting and backend infrastructure, Analytics, Registration and authentication, Managing contacts and sending messages and Social features.

section: H2:The purposes of processing
sentence: For specific information about the Personal Data used for each purpose, the User may refer to the section “Detailed information on the processing of Personal Data”.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Legal basis of processing
sentence: The Owner may process Personal Data relating to Users if one of the following applies: Users have given their consent for one or more specific purposes.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Legal basis of processing
sentence: The Owner may process Personal Data relating to Users if one of the following applies: provision of Data is necessary for the performance of an agreement with the User and/or for any pre-contractual obligations thereof;

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Legal basis of processing
sentence: The Owner may process Personal Data relating to Users if one of the following applies: processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the Owner is subject;

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Legal basis of processing
sentence: The Owner may process Personal Data relating to Users if one of the following applies: processing is related to a task that is carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the Owner;

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Legal basis of processing
sentence: The Owner may process Personal Data relating to Users if one of the following applies: processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the Owner or by a third party.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Legal basis of processing
sentence: In any case, the Owner will gladly help to clarify the specific legal basis that applies to the processing, and in particular whether the provision of Personal Data is a statutory or contractual requirement, or a requirement necessary to enter into a contract.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Further information about retention time
sentence: Unless specified otherwise in this document, Personal Data shall be processed and stored for as long as required by the purpose they have been collected for and may be retained for longer due to applicable legal obligation or based on the Users’ consent.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Further information about retention time
sentence: Therefore: Personal Data collected for purposes related to the performance of a contract between the Owner and the User shall be retained until such contract has been fully performed.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Further information about retention time
sentence: Therefore: Personal Data collected for the purposes of the Owner’s legitimate interests shall be retained as long as needed to fulfill such purposes. Users may find specific information regarding the legitimate interests pursued by the Owner within the relevant sections of this document or by contacting the Owner.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Further information about retention time
sentence: The Owner may be allowed to retain Personal Data for a longer period whenever the User has given consent to such processing, as long as such consent is not withdrawn. Furthermore, the Owner may be obliged to retain Personal Data for a longer period whenever required to fulfil a legal obligation or upon order of an authority.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:Further information about retention time
sentence: Once the retention period expires, Personal Data shall be deleted. Therefore, the right of access, the right to erasure, the right to rectification and the right to data portability cannot be enforced after expiration of the retention period.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: Users may exercise certain rights regarding their Data processed by the Owner.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Withdraw their consent at any time. Users have the right to withdraw consent where they have previously given their consent to the processing of their Personal Data.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Object to processing of their Data. Users have the right to object to the processing of their Data if the processing is carried out on a legal basis other than consent.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Access their Data. Users have the right to learn if Data is being processed by the Owner, obtain disclosure regarding certain aspects of the processing and obtain a copy of the Data undergoing processing.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Verify and seek rectification. Users have the right to verify the accuracy of their Data and ask for it to be updated or corrected.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Restrict the processing of their Data. Users have the right to restrict the processing of their Data. In this case, the Owner will not process their Data for any purpose other than storing it.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Have their Personal Data deleted or otherwise removed. Users have the right to obtain the erasure of their Data from the Owner.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Receive their Data and have it transferred to another controller. Users have the right to receive their Data in a structured, commonly used and machine readable format and, if technically feasible, to have it transmitted to another controller without any hindrance.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: In particular, Users have the right to do the following, to the extent permitted by law: Lodge a complaint. Users have the right to bring a claim before their competent data protection authority.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
sentence: Users are also entitled to learn about the legal basis for Data transfers abroad including to any international organization governed by public international law or set up by two or more countries, such as the UN, and about the security measures taken by the Owner to safeguard their Data.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) > H4:Details about the right to object to processing
sentence: Where Personal Data is processed for a public interest, in the exercise of an official authority vested in the Owner or for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the Owner, Users may object to such processing by providing a ground related to their particular situation to justify the objection.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) > H4:Details about the right to object to processing
sentence: Users must know that, however, should their Personal Data be processed for direct marketing purposes, they can object to that processing at any time, free of charge and without providing any justification. Where the User objects to processing for direct marketing purposes, the Personal Data will no longer be processed for such purposes. To learn whether the Owner is processing Personal Data for direct marketing purposes, Users may refer to the relevant sections of this document.

section: H2:Further Information for Users > H3:The rights of Users based on the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) > H4:How to exercise these rights
sentence: Any requests to exercise User rights can be directed to the Owner through the contact details provided in this document. Such requests are free of charge and will be answered by the Owner as early as possible and always within one month, providing Users with the information required by law. Any rectification or erasure of Personal Data or restriction of processing will be communicated by the Owner to each recipient, if any, to whom the Personal Data has been disclosed unless this proves impossible or involves disproportionate effort. At the Users’ request, the Owner will inform them about those recipients.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States
sentence: This part of the document integrates with and supplements the information contained in the rest of the privacy policy and is provided by the business running QuestUpon and, if the case may be, its parent, subsidiaries and affiliates (for the purposes of this section referred to collectively as “we”, “us”, “our”).

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States
sentence: The information contained in this section applies to all Users (Users are referred to below, simply as “you”, “your”, “yours”), who are residents in the following states: California, Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Utah, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States
sentence: For such Users, this information supersedes any other possibly divergent or conflicting provisions contained in the privacy policy.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States
sentence: This part of the document uses the term Personal Information.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Notice at collection
sentence: The following Notice at collection provides you with timely notice about the categories of Personal Information collected or disclosed in the past 12 months so that you can exercise meaningful control over our use of that Information.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Audio, electronic, visual, thermal, olfactory, or similar information
sentence: i️ You can read the definitions of these concepts inside the “Definitions and legal references section” of the privacy policy.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Audio, electronic, visual, thermal, olfactory, or similar information
sentence: To know more about your rights in particular to opt out of certain processing activities you can refer to the “Your privacy rights under US state laws” section of our privacy policy.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Audio, electronic, visual, thermal, olfactory, or similar information
sentence: For more details on the collection of Personal Information, please read the section “Detailed information on the processing of Personal Data” of our privacy policy.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Audio, electronic, visual, thermal, olfactory, or similar information
sentence: We won’t process your Information for unexpected purposes, or for purposes that are not reasonably necessary to and compatible with the purposes originally disclosed, without your consent.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:What are the sources of the Personal Information we collect?
sentence: We collect the above-mentioned categories of Personal Information, either directly or indirectly, from you when you use QuestUpon.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:What are the sources of the Personal Information we collect?
sentence: For example, you directly provide your Personal Information when you submit requests via any forms on QuestUpon. You also provide Personal Information indirectly when you navigate QuestUpon, as Personal Information about you is automatically observed and collected.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:What are the sources of the Personal Information we collect?
sentence: Finally, we may collect your Personal Information from third parties that work with us in connection with the Service or with the functioning of QuestUpon and features thereof.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: You may exercise certain rights regarding your Personal Information. In particular, to the extent permitted by applicable law, you have: the right to access Personal Information: the right to know. You have the right to request that we confirm whether or not we are processing your Personal Information. You also have the right to access such Personal Information;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: You may exercise certain rights regarding your Personal Information. In particular, to the extent permitted by applicable law, you have: the right to correct inaccurate Personal Information. You have the right to request that we correct any inaccurate Personal Information we maintain about you;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: You may exercise certain rights regarding your Personal Information. In particular, to the extent permitted by applicable law, you have: the right to request the deletion of your Personal Information. You have the right to request that we delete any of your Personal Information;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: You may exercise certain rights regarding your Personal Information. In particular, to the extent permitted by applicable law, you have: the right to obtain a copy of your Personal Information. We will provide your Personal Information in a portable and usable format that allows you to transfer data easily to another entity – provided that this is technically feasible;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: You may exercise certain rights regarding your Personal Information. In particular, to the extent permitted by applicable law, you have: the right to opt out from the Sale of your Personal Information; We will not discriminate against you for exercising your privacy rights.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: You may exercise certain rights regarding your Personal Information. In particular, to the extent permitted by applicable law, you have: the right to non-discrimination.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in California
sentence: In addition to the rights listed above common to all Users in the United States, as a User residing in California, you have: The right to opt out of the Sharing of your Personal Information for cross-context behavioral advertising;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in California
sentence: In addition to the rights listed above common to all Users in the United States, as a User residing in California, you have: The right to request to limit our use or disclosure of your Sensitive Personal Information to only that which is necessary to perform the services or provide the goods, as is reasonably expected by an average consumer. Please note that certain exceptions outlined in the law may apply, such as, when the collection and processing of Sensitive Personal Information is necessary to verify or maintain the quality or safety of our service.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: In addition to the rights listed above common to all Users in the United States, as a User residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana you have

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: The right to opt out of the processing of your personal information for Targeted Advertising or profiling in furtherance of decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects concerning you;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: The right to freely give, deny or withdraw your consent for the processing of your Sensitive Personal Information. Please note that certain exceptions outlined in the law may apply, such as, but not limited to, when the collection and processing of Sensitive Personal Information is necessary for the provision of a product or service specifically requested by the consumer. In Maryland, your Sensitive Personal Information will be collected or processed only if strictly necessary to provide or maintain a specific product or service requested by you.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: In Minnesota and Maryland Users also have the right to obtain a list of the specific third parties to which the controller has disclosed the consumer's personal data

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: * Note that in some states like Minnesota you have the following specific rights connected to profiling: The right to question the results of the profiling;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: * Note that in some states like Minnesota you have the following specific rights connected to profiling: The right to be informed of the reason that the profiling resulted in the decision; if feasible

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: * Note that in some states like Minnesota you have the following specific rights connected to profiling: The right to be informed of what actions the consumer might have taken to secure a different decision and the actions that the consumer might take to secure a different decision in the future;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: * Note that in some states like Minnesota you have the following specific rights connected to profiling: The right to review personal data used in the profiling;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for Users residing in Virginia, Colorado, Connecticut, Texas, Oregon, Nevada, Delaware, Iowa, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Nebraska, Tennessee, Minnesota, Maryland, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island and Montana
sentence: * Note that in some states like Minnesota you have the following specific rights connected to profiling: If inaccurate, the right to have the data corrected and the profiling decision reevaluated based on the corrected data;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for users residing in Utah and Iowa
sentence: In addition to the rights listed above common to all Users in the United States, as a User residing in Utah and Iowa, you have: The right to opt out of the processing of your Personal Information for Targeted Advertising;

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:Your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:Additional rights for users residing in Utah and Iowa
sentence: In addition to the rights listed above common to all Users in the United States, as a User residing in Utah and Iowa, you have: The right to opt out of the processing of your Sensitive Personal Information. Please note that certain exceptions outlined in the law may apply, such as, but not limited to, when the collection and processing of Sensitive Personal Information is necessary for the provision of a product or service specifically requested by the consumer.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: To exercise the rights described above, you need to submit your request to us by contacting us via the contact details provided in this document.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: For us to respond to your request, we must know who you are. We will not respond to any request if we are unable to verify your identity and therefore confirm the Personal Information in our possession relates to you. You are not required to create an account with us to submit your request. We will use any Personal Information collected from you in connection with the verification of your request solely for verification and shall not further disclose the Personal Information, retain it longer than necessary for purposes of verification, or use it for unrelated purposes.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws
sentence: If you are an adult, you can make a request on behalf of a child under your parental authority.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:How to exercise your rights to opt out
sentence: In addition to what is stated above, to exercise your right to opt-out of Sale or Sharing and Targeted Advertising you can also use the privacy choices link provided on QuestUpon.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:How to exercise your rights to opt out
sentence: If you want to submit requests to opt out of Sale or Sharing and Targeted Advertising activities via a user-enabled global privacy control, such as for example the Global Privacy Control (“GPC”), you are free to do so and we will abide by such request in a frictionless manner.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:How and when we are expected to handle your request
sentence: We will respond to your request without undue delay, but in all cases within the timeframe required by applicable law. Should we need more time, we will explain to you the reasons why, and how much more time we need.

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:How and when we are expected to handle your request
sentence: Should we deny your request, we will explain to you the reasons behind our denial (where envisaged by applicable law you may then contact the relevant authority to submit a complaint).

section: H2:Further information for Users in the United States > H3:How to exercise your privacy rights under US state laws > H4:How and when we are expected to handle your request
sentence: We do not charge a fee to process or respond to your request unless such request is manifestly unfounded or excessive and in all other cases where it is permitted by the applicable law. In such cases, we may charge a reasonable fee or refuse to act on the request. In either case, we will communicate our choices and explain the reasons behind them.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Legal action
sentence: The User's Personal Data may be used for legal purposes by the Owner in Court or in the stages leading to possible legal action arising from improper use of QuestUpon or the related Services.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Legal action
sentence: The User declares to be aware that the Owner may be required to reveal personal data upon request of public authorities.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Additional information about User's Personal Data
sentence: In addition to the information contained in this privacy policy, QuestUpon may provide the User with additional and contextual information concerning particular Services or the collection and processing of Personal Data upon request.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:System logs and maintenance
sentence: For operation and maintenance purposes, QuestUpon and any third-party services may collect files that record interaction with QuestUpon (System logs) or use other Personal Data (such as the IP Address) for this purpose.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Information not contained in this policy
sentence: More details concerning the collection or processing of Personal Data may be requested from the Owner at any time. Please see the contact information at the beginning of this document.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Changes to this privacy policy
sentence: The Owner reserves the right to make changes to this privacy policy at any time by notifying its Users on this page and possibly within QuestUpon and/or - as far as technically and legally feasible - sending a notice to Users via any contact information available to the Owner. It is strongly recommended to check this page often, referring to the date of the last modification listed at the bottom.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Changes to this privacy policy
sentence: Should the changes affect processing activities performed on the basis of the User’s consent, the Owner shall collect new consent from the User, where required.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Personal Data (or Data) / Personal Information (or Information)
sentence: Any information that directly, indirectly, or in connection with other information — including a personal identification number — allows for the identification or identifiability of a natural person.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Sensitive Personal Information
sentence: Sensitive Personal Information means any Personal Information that is not publicly available and reveals information considered sensitive according to the applicable privacy law.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Usage Data
sentence: Information collected automatically through QuestUpon (or third-party services employed in QuestUpon), which can include: the IP addresses or domain names of the computers utilized by the Users who use QuestUpon, the URI addresses (Uniform Resource Identifier), the time of the request, the method utilized to submit the request to the server, the size of the file received in response, the numerical code indicating the status of the server's answer (successful outcome, error, etc.), the country of origin, the features of the browser and the operating system utilized by the User, the various time details per visit (e.g., the time spent on each page within the Application) and the details about the path followed within the Application with special reference to the sequence of pages visited, and other parameters about the device operating system and/or the User's IT environment.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:User
sentence: The individual using QuestUpon who, unless otherwise specified, coincides with the Data Subject.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Data Subject
sentence: The natural person to whom the Personal Data refers.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Data Processor (or Processor)
sentence: The natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which processes Personal Data on behalf of the Controller, as described in this privacy policy.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Data Controller (or Owner)
sentence: The natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of the processing of Personal Data, including the security measures concerning the operation and use of QuestUpon. The Data Controller, unless otherwise specified, is the Owner of QuestUpon.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:QuestUpon (or this Application)
sentence: The means by which the Personal Data of the User is collected and processed.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Service
sentence: The service provided by QuestUpon as described in the relative terms (if available) and on this site/application.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Sale
sentence: Sale means any exchange of Personal Information by the Owner to a third party, for monetary or other valuable consideration, as defined by the applicable privacy US state law. Please note that the exchange of Personal Information with a service provider pursuant to a written contract that meets the requirements set by the applicable law, does not constitute a Sale of your Personal Information.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Sharing
sentence: Sharing means any sharing, renting, releasing, disclosing, disseminating, making available, transferring, or otherwise communicating orally, in writing, or by electronic or other means, a consumer's Personal Information by the business to a third party for cross-context behavioral advertising, whether for monetary or other valuable consideration, including transactions between a business and a third party for cross-context behavioral advertising for the benefit of a business in which no money is exchanged, as defined by the California privacy laws. Please note that the exchange of Personal Information with a service provider pursuant to a written contract that meets the requirements set by the California privacy laws, does not constitute sharing of your Personal Information.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Targeted advertising
sentence: Targeted advertising means displaying advertisements to a consumer where the advertisement is selected based on Personal Information obtained from that consumer’s activities over time and across nonaffiliated websites or online applications to predict such consumer’s preferences or interests, as defined by the applicable privacy US state law.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:European Union (or EU)
sentence: Unless otherwise specified, all references made within this document to the European Union include all current member states to the European Union and the European Economic Area.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Cookie
sentence: Cookies are Trackers consisting of small sets of data stored in the User's browser.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Tracker
sentence: Tracker indicates any technology

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Tracker
sentence: e.g Cookies, unique identifiers, web beacons, embedded scripts, e-tags and fingerprinting

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Tracker
sentence: that enables the tracking of Users, for example by accessing or storing information on the User’s device.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Legal information
sentence: This policy has been prepared based on provisions of multiple legislations.

section: H2:Additional information about Data collection and processing > H3:Definitions and legal references > H4:Legal information
sentence: This policy relates solely to QuestUpon, if not stated otherwise within this document.
